addShare((uint128,uint120,uint8),address.details: Adds a new mint share to the contract

params._share: The share structure containing recipient, amount, metric, and chips

burn(uint256).details: Burns the specified value of tokens from the given account

burnShare(address).details: Burns the share at the specified index

permitShare((uint128,uint120,uint8),uint.details: Permits a share to be transferred

params._share: The share structure containing recipient, amount, metric, and chips
params.dealline: The deadline for the share transfer
params.signature: The signature of the share transfer

publicSell(uint256,bytes).details: how much cost to buy tts

setBan(address,bool).details: Sets or unsets a ban on a recipient address, restricting their access.

params._recipient: The address to ban or unban.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to ban (true) or unban (false) the address.

setCallMintTTS(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes permission to call mintTTS to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke permission.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setDAOAdmin(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes DAO admin privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke DAO admin rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setEnv(address).details: Sets the environment variables for normal good ID, value good ID, and market contract address

params._marketcontract: The address of the market contract

setMarketAdmin(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Market admin privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Market admin rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setMarketManager(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Market manager privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Market manager rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setRatio(uint256).details: Sets the trading volume ratio for the protocol.

params.user: The address of the user being referred

setStakeAdmin(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Stake admin privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Stake admin rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setStakeManager(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Stake manager privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Stake manager rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setTokenAdmin(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Token admin privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Token admin rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

setTokenManager(address,bool).details: Grants or revokes Token manager privileges to a recipient address.

params._recipient: The address to grant or revoke Token manager rights.
params.result: Boolean indicating whether to grant (true) or revoke (false) the privilege.

shareHash((uint128,uint120,uint8),addres.details: Calculates the hash of a share transfer

params._share: The share structure containing recipient, amount, metric, and chips
params.deadline: The deadline for the share transfer

shareMint().details: Mints a share at the specified

params.proofvalue: The proof value for the stake

stakeproofinfo(uint256).details: Returns the stake proof information for a given index.

params.index: The index to query for stake proof information.

returns._0: The s_proof struct containing the stake proof details.

usershares(address).details: Returns the share information for a given user address.

params.user: The address to query for share information.

returns._0: The s_share struct containing the user's share details.

withdrawPublicSell(uint256,address).details: Withdraws the specified amount from the public sale to the recipient

params.amount: admin tranfer public sell to another address

addShare((uint128,uint120,uint8),address.notice: Only callable on the main chain by the DAO adminReduces the left_share by the amount in _shareIncrements the shares_index and adds the new share to the shares mappingEmits an e_addShare event with the share details

getreferral(address).notice: Get the DAO admin and referral for a customer
